title: requests — scheduled tasks
description: Cron entries registered by `AccessRequestServiceProvider::schedule()`. UTC throughout. `runOnOneServer` on every entry so multi-node worker pools do not duplicate work. `withoutOverlapping` where windows may exceed the interval.

entries.description: Daily 03:15 UTC. Dispatches CleanupOrphanedRequestsJob. Auto-rejects pending requests whose target resource no longer exists (deleted between submit + decision) or whose resource_type left the registry.

Every 6 hours. Scans pending requests older than `config('access.requests.notifications.reminder_after_hours')` (default 24h) where fewer than `max_reminders` reminders have been sent. Dispatches AccessRequestReminderNotification to each pending approver. Gated by the `access_request_reminders` entitlement — tenants without it are skipped.

Weekly Monday 08:00 UTC. Aggregates the previous week's + previous 30 days' access-request funnel per tenant (submissions, approval rate, average time to decision). Emits a compliance report to platform ops via notifications and snapshots counts to the compliance store for SOC 2 CC7.2 evidence.

notes: No 'expire pending' entry here — workflow/approvals already runs its own `approvals:process-timeouts` every 5 minutes. This module inherits that timer via the ApprovalExpired shim listener.

Reminder cadence is deliberately coarse-grained (6h) so pending approvers get at most 4 reminders a day, and only during their working hours if their tenant's timezone-aware setting is used later. Wave 1b keeps it UTC-uniform.
